criteria.text: Year-ago values in the report: when the connected workbook has prior-year named ranges, /api/reports includes a numeric yearAgo per metric and totalEncounters.yearAgo (their sum), alongside existing last/prior WoW fields
YoY delta in the Reports page: each metric shows a year-over-year change (current vs year-ago, percent + direction) visually distinct from WoW, color-blind-safe (icon/text not color alone)

Graceful absence / back-compat: a workbook with no prior-year ranges omits yearAgo (optional fields); the page renders WoW exactly as today with no YoY column and no error; no breaking change to the DTO
Encounters-by-specialty YoY: each specialty row carries its year-ago comparison consistent with the metric table
Aggregate-only, no PHI: response and logs carry only aggregate counts (no patient/customer identifiers); workbook read audits item reference + outcome only, never cell values (per MAD-26)
